name: Zomblox.io
author: Poki
description: Zomblox.io is a shooting game set in a dangerous blocky world filled with zombies and other enemies. Explore this zombie-filled environment across different game modes. In Survival Mode, face waves of zombies and test how far you can survive alone. If fighting solo feels too intense, team up with friends in CO-OP Mode to fight the undead together. Want to challenge your skills against others? Jump into PvP Mode or Clash Mode for intense player battles. As you play, earn coins to unlock cool skins for yourself and your weapons. You can also play on custom maps or create your own in the map editor. Are you ready to face a wide variety of zombies and conquer the blocky world? How to play Zomblox.io? Move: WASD Jump: the space bar Attack: left click Equip: E Stats: Tab Wave: C Cinema: V Who created Zomblox.io? Zomblox.io is created by Jetti Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Zomblox.io for free? You can play Zomblox.io for free on Poki. Can I play Zomblox.io on mobile devices and desktop? Zomblox.io can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Zomblox.io with my friend? Yes! Zomblox.io is a single or online multiplayer game so you can play with your friend!
